source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/11_Audit F-up/240415-17 ISO 갱신심사 & 2,3G MDR 심사 - 3EC/MDR 심사/심사 대비 자료_240415-17/1. 기술문서 (A-TCF-5-149 TCF_24.04.12)/A-TCF-5-156 Test Reports (rev.3)_update.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Summary of test reports for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW, and WBW880A covering safety, EMC, wireless EMC, biocompatibility, DQE, transport, IPX6, and RED testing.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Technical documentation evidence showing applied standards, laboratories, report numbers, issue dates, and compliance status for product test reports.
keyPoints: Devices are tested in accordance with applied standards before being placed on the market.
Nemko Korea, Korea Testing Laboratory, SGS Korea, and in-house testing are identified as laboratories.
Most summarized test reports state a test result of Compliance.
The document lists report numbers and issue dates from 2020-04-17 through 2024-03-19.

entities.name: A1417MCW
entities.evidence: Model A1417MCW is listed for safety, EMC, wireless EMC, biocompatibility, DQE, and IPX6 tests.

entities.name: A1717MCW
entities.evidence: Model A1717MCW is listed for safety, EMC, wireless EMC, biocompatibility, DQE, transportation environment, and IPX6 tests.

evidence.claim: Products are inspected under the quality management system before market placement and tested according to applied standards.
evidence.evidenceText: All our products are subjected to be inspected in accordance with our quality management system before the products are placed on the market. Also, the devices are tested in accordance with the applied standard.

evidence.claim: IEC 60601-1 testing for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW was performed by Nemko Korea with report REP001842 issued 2022-11-08 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard IEC 60601-1: 2005 /A1:2012 (3.1rd, CB Scheme); Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; Model A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW; Issued date 2022-11-08; Test Report No. REP001842; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: EN 60601-1-2 EMC testing for A1417MCW and F1417MCW is associated with report NK-22-E-0810 issued 2022-10-04 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical Electrical Equipment – Part1-2... Applied Standard EN 60601-1-2:2014 /A1:2021; Model A1417MCW, F1417MCW; Issued date 2022-10-04; Test Report No. NK-22-E-0810; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: EN 60601-1-2 EMC testing for A1717MCW is associated with report NK-22-E-0813 issued 2022-10-04 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical Electrical Equipment – Part1-2... Model A1717MCW; Issued date 2022-10-04; Test Report No. NK-22-E-0813; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: Wireless EMC testing for A1417MCW and F1417MCW was performed by Nemko Korea under EN 301 489-1, EN 301 489-3, and EN 301 489-17 with report REP031070 issued 2024-03-07 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: (Wireless) EMC Test; Applied Standard EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3, EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2, EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6; Model A1417MCW, F1417MCW; Issued date 2024-03-07; Test Report No. REP031070; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: Wireless EMC testing for A1717MCW was performed by Nemko Korea under EN 301 489-1, EN 301 489-3, and EN 301 489-17 with report REP031071 issued 2024-03-07 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: (Wireless) EMC Test; Model A1717MCW; Issued date 2024-03-07; Test Report No. REP031071; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: Battery information is referenced to Attachment 6 pages 614-661 of the 60601-1 test report.
evidence.evidenceText: Battery Refer to Attachment 6 (page 614-661) of the 60601-1 test report.

evidence.claim: Biocompatibility testing for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW deco sheet was performed by Korea Testing Laboratory under ISO 10993 standards with report 20-007374-01-1 issued 2020-04-17 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: Biocompatibility; Model A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW (Deco sheet); Korea Testing Laboratory; ISO 10993-1:2018, ISO 10993-5:2009, ISO 10993-10:2010; 20-007374-01-1; 2020-04-17; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: DQE testing for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW was performed in-house under EN 62220-1-1:2015 with report A-TCF-5-116 issued 2022-11-21.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard EN 62220-1-1:2015; Laboratory In-house testing (H&abyz Co., Ltd.); Model A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW; Issued date 2022-11-21; Test Report No. A-TCF-5-116; Test result (Refer to summary).

evidence.claim: Transportation environment testing for A1717MCW was performed by SGS Korea under manufacturer-set conditions with report SGS-R23-0128-EN00 issued 2023-01-12 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: Transportation environment test; Applied Standard (conditions set forth by the manufacturer.); Laboratory SGS Korea Co., Ltd.; Model A1717MCW; Issued date 2023-01-12; Test Report No. SGS-R23-0128-EN00; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: IPX6 enclosure protection testing for A1417MCW is associated with report SGS-R22-2398-EN00 issued 2022-11-14 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: Degrees of protection provided by enclosures test (IPX6); Laboratory SGS Korea Co., Ltd.; Model A1417MCW; Issued date 2022-11-14; Test Report No. SGS-R22-2398-EN00; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: IPX6 enclosure protection testing for A1717MCW is associated with report SGS-R22-2399-EN00 issued 2022-11-24 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: Degrees of protection provided by enclosures test (IPX6); Laboratory SGS Korea Co., Ltd.; Model A1717MCW; Issued date 2022-11-24; Test Report No. SGS-R22-2399-EN00; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: RED testing for Wi-Fi transceiver model WBW880A was performed by Nemko Korea with report 0470-RED-185003 issued 2024-03-19 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: RED Test; Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; Model WBW880A; Issued date 2024-03-19; Test Report No. 0470-RED-185003; Test result Compliance.

evidence.claim: Nemko Korea is identified with an ISO/IEC 17025:2017 certificate.
evidence.evidenceText: 3.1 Testing Laboratory: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd ISO/IEC 17025:2017 Certificate.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not explicitly present in the source text; date-like values appear in the source path and report issue dates but are not identified as the document date.
Authority or jurisdiction is only indicated by the provided authoritySignal MFDS/domestic, not by explicit source text.

Potential conflicting standard text for EMC: the table lists EN 60601-1-2:2015/A1:2021 for A1417MCW and F1417MCW, the summary lists EN 60601-1-2:2014/A1:2021, and the A1717MCW table line appears as EN 60601-1-2015/A1:2021.
Potential conflicting wireless EMC amendment reference: the table lists REP031070 as Amendment of NK-22-E-0812, but the summary lists REP031070 as Amendment of NK-22-E-0815.
Several summaries refer to attachments or summaries not included in the provided text, including battery Attachment 6 and test report cover pages.
